title: rubus × pubidorsus
intro: Rubus × pubidorsus, a hybrid of the raspberry and blackberry plants, is a type of bramble that is known for its antioxidant-rich properties. The medicinal properties of Rubus × pubidorsus include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high content of anthocyanins and ellagic acid. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × pubidorsus include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving cognitive function, and supporting the immune system. Rubus × pubidorsus is often used in herbal preparations, such as jams, jellies, and teas, which are consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
